mapper.update: UPDATE pinova.admin_login_session SET revoked_at = #{now}, updated_at = #{now}, updated_by = account_id WHERE token_hash = #{tokenHash} AND revoked_at IS NULL
UPDATE pinova.admin_login_session SET revoked_at = #{now}, updated_at = #{now}, updated_by = account_id WHERE account_id = #{accountId} AND revoked_at IS NULL
